text.title: ads-google-reporting Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for ads-google-reporting. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Never optimize based on clicks or impressions alone. Focus on conversion metrics (CPA, ROAS, conversions) to align optimization with business outcomes.
rule.rationale: More clicks or impressions do not guarantee more conversions; vanity metrics can lead to budget waste.

rule.statement: Do not ignore the Search Terms report. New irrelevant searches accumulate weekly and burn budget; review it at least weekly.
rule.rationale: Search Terms is the earliest signal of wasted spend and new keyword opportunities.

rule.statement: Avoid over-optimizing or making major changes daily. Limit major restructures to monthly cycles; day-to-day noise resets learning.
rule.rationale: Google's learning algorithms need stability; constant churn prevents the system from reaching stability.
